commit.message:
Scale each heat layer max to its own data for proper intensity rendering

Previously all layers shared a max derived from the total dataset,
making individual layers look uniformly faint. Now each layer
(Won/Lost/Cancelled/Quoted) calculates its own max from its data,
so intensity hotspots are properly visible per category.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add reproducible CPU/GPU benchmark system with loaded MPS/MPO data

- Serialization system: save/load MPS and MPO in binary format
- Python tools: serialize_mps_mpo.py, load_mps_mpo.py, verify_loaders.py
- C++ loader: mps_mpo_loader.hpp with MPSLoader and MPOLoader classes
- Benchmark data: Initial MPS/MPO for 6 test cases (seed=42)
- CPU gold standard results: Quimb DMRG1+DMRG2 energies
- GPU benchmark executable: pdmrg_benchmark_loaded with warm-up phase
- Documentation: QUICKSTART.md, REPRODUCIBLE_BENCHMARKS.md, GPU_BENCHMARK_INTEGRATION.md

Features:
- Fixed seed (42) ensures exact reproducibility
- Same initial conditions for CPU and GPU benchmarks
- Single-stream warm-up phase (configurable, default=3 sweeps)
- Multi-stream parallel DMRG phase
- Validation against CPU gold standard energies

Gold standard energies:
- Heisenberg L=12: -5.1420906328 Ha
- Heisenberg L=20: -8.6824733344 Ha
- Josephson L=8:   -2.8438010431 Ha
- Josephson L=12:  -4.5070608947 Ha

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Feat: import CSV/Excel — colonnes depuis + mois_payes + montant_paye

- Nouvelle colonne 'depuis' → since (année/mois d'arrivée du résident)
- Nouvelle colonne 'mois_payes' → calcule paidThrough automatiquement
  (ex: mois_payes=3 en fév 2026 → paidThrough='2026-04', statut Payé)
- Nouvelle colonne 'montant_paye' → convertit MAD en mois via cotisation
  (utilise monthly_fee de la ligne ou cotisation par défaut du bâtiment)
- Nouvelle colonne 'monthly_fee' → cotisation individuelle du résident
- Logique: 0 mois → En attente; N mois → Payé jusqu'à CURRENT_MONTH+N-1
- Preview étape 2: colonnes Depuis + Mois payés avec badge vert/amber
- Modèle CSV téléchargeable mis à jour avec 3 exemples et note explicative
- Hint texte étape 1: liste toutes les colonnes optionnelles disponibles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent selling at price 0 in position-resolver

Skip positions where currentPrice < 0.005 to avoid 100% loss
from empty order books or stale Gamma data. The previous behavior
triggered stop-loss at price 0, sold at $0.01, and activated the
kill switch from accumulated losses.

Match hover bar height to PTT listening view (both 50pt)

The hover "Push to talk" bar was ~30pt while the PTT voice listening
view was 50pt. When PTT activated, the window resized from 30→50pt,
causing a visible jump. Now both use frame(height: 50) so the window
stays the same size through the hover→PTT transition.

commit.message:
fix: handle cookie write error in Server Components

Supabase SSR tries to refresh session cookies when calling getUser(),
but Next.js 15 only allows cookie writes in Server Actions and Route
Handlers. Wrap setAll in try-catch so Server Components can still
read the session without crashing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix orbit line picking, soften minimap border, add HUD dead zone

Three fixes:

1. Orbit line raycaster threshold now scales with camera distance
   (0.4% of distance to origin). The old fixed 0.5 unit threshold
   was far too small when viewing from thousands of units away —
   lines were impossible to hover/click. Now works at any zoom.

2. Minimap border softened: thinner (1px vs 1.5px), dimmer green
   (0.08,0.25,0.08 at 45% vs 0.15,0.6,0.15 at 70%). Matches the
   subtle style of the orbit lines inside the minimap.

3. Minimap is now a dead zone for warp star selection. Clicks
   inside the circular HUD are always consumed — they either
   select a minimap body or do nothing, but never fall through
   to background starfield selection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add loan contract resolution step (CHANGES-05)

Three-tier loan resolution for bank transactions:
- Tier 1: Extract contract number from Estonian descriptions (5 regex patterns)
- Tier 2: Match by counterparty account number
- Tier 3: Auto-register DRAFT loan if contract number found but no match

Adds LoanResolutionStep after F14RuleMappingStep in the pipeline,
persists loan_id and loan_direction on enrichment records.
Non-blocking: transactions without loan linkage continue normally.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add vertical padding to PageComponent

Adds py-4 to PADDING_CLASSES so pages have consistent top spacing
between the navbar and content, especially on mobile where the
page header is hidden.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

MCP-native agent communication — no kitty for normal message passing

Agents now communicate via shared state file instead of kitty terminal
scraping. New tools:
- wait_for_task(): agents block until work arrives (polls state file)
- chat() writes to inbox in state instead of kitty send-text
- delegate() writes task to state instead of kitty send-text
- wait_for_any() checks inbox + task status changes

Kitty read (task_check) kept as escape hatch for stuck agents.

Agent identifiers are now polymorphic: kitty window IDs (number) for
terminal agents, or name strings (e.g. "todd") for headless agents.

Task status flow: blocked → pending → working → idle/done
New "working" status = task acknowledged by wait_for_task().
